name: go-tp-hallucinated-call
desc: bare call to a symbol that exists nowhere must be flagged

name: go-tp-typo-with-suggestion
desc: one-edit typo of a known symbol is flagged with a did-you-mean

name: go-tn-known-symbol
desc: calling an IR-known symbol is clean

name: go-tn-builtins
go-tn-qualified-calls
desc: pkg.Func and obj.Method are assumed external and skipped

name: go-tn-unexported-refs-skipped
desc: lowercase calls are skipped — the IR only indexes exported symbols

name: go-tn-same-edit-definition
desc: a function defined in the same edit may be called in the same edit (pass 1)

name: go-tn-sql-in-raw-string
desc: SQL keywords inside a single-line raw string must not read as calls

name: go-tn-multiline-raw-string
desc: raw string spanning consecutive lines stays blanked (VALUES ( is not a call)

name: go-tn-comment-mentions-call
desc: whole-line comments are skipped even when they name a call

name: go-tp-star-prefix-wrapped-code
desc: FIX: a hallucinated call on a `* `-prefixed line (a wrapped multiplication, NOT inside a block comment) must be flagged (was a silent FN — `* ` prefix was guessed to be a comment)

name: go-tn-star-prefix-inside-block-comment
desc: FIX: a `* `-prefixed line genuinely inside a /* ... */ block comment stays a comment (state-driven), so the named call is not flagged

name: go-tn-inline-block-comment
desc: FIX: an inline /* ... */ block comment is blanked but surrounding code is still scanned
